features.name: Landing page render
features.description: Page loads with hero headline, three feature cards (Opening trees, Game studies, Spaced repetition), and a sign-in/sign-up form — no JS errors in the visible body.

features.name: Sign-in flow
features.description: Submitting the sign-in form with valid credentials redirects to /trainer/studies and renders the Studies page heading without errors.

features.name: Sign-up form render
features.description: Switching the form to 'Create account' mode renders name, email, password inputs, and role-picker buttons (Trainer / Student / Solo) with no visible errors.

features.name: Tour page
features.description: Navigating to /tour renders the marketing tour page without uncaught exceptions or blank content.

features.name: Trainer studies list
features.description: After login, /trainer/studies shows the Studies heading, stat tiles (studies authored, students linked, chapters total), and three labelled sections (Opening studies, Game studies, Tactical sets).

features.name: New study dropdown menu
features.description: Clicking 'New study' on the studies page opens a dropdown with three options — Opening study, Game study, and Tactical set.

features.name: New opening study dialog
features.description: Choosing 'Opening study' from the New study menu opens a dialog where a name can be entered and the study created successfully.

features.name: New game study dialog
features.description: Choosing 'Game study' from the New study menu opens a dialog with a name field and a PGN textarea that can be submitted.

features.name: New tactical set dialog
features.description: Choosing 'Tactical set' from the New study menu opens a dialog with a name field that can be submitted to create a tactic set.

features.name: Import from Lichess dialog
features.description: Clicking 'Import from Lichess' opens a dialog or flow requesting a Lichess study URL, without JS errors.

features.name: Trainer students list
features.description: Navigating to /trainer/students renders the Students heading and filter tabs (All / Linked / Invited) without errors.

features.name: Invite student
features.description: Clicking 'Invite student' on the students page opens an invitation dialog or flow with an input for the student's identifier.

features.name: Trainer game browser
features.description: Navigating to /trainer/games renders the 'Browse games' heading with source tabs (Chess.com, Lichess, Database) and a board with Undo/Reset controls.

features.name: Student dashboard
features.description: Navigating to /student/dashboard renders a greeting with the user's name, assignment count stats, Today card, and Activity card — no uncaught errors.

features.name: Settings page
features.description: Navigating to /settings renders all four sections — Profile (name/email save), Roles (toggle buttons), Password (change form), and API keys (New key button) — without errors.

features.name: Profile menu dropdown
features.description: Clicking the avatar/name button in the top-right header opens a profile menu showing user name, email, role chips and a sign-out button — present across all authed pages.

features.name: Trainer students filter tabs
features.description: On /trainer/students the All / Linked / Invited filter tabs switch the rendered list without errors and the active tab is visually distinguished.

features.name: Student dashboard Active/Completed tabs
features.description: On /student/dashboard the 'Active' and 'Completed' tabs under the assignments list switch between the two states without errors and reflect the selected tab visually.

features.name: Settings API key creation
features.description: On /settings the API keys section's 'New key' button opens a creation flow or reveals a new key, with no console/page errors.

features.name: Student opening study viewer
features.description: Navigating to /student/study/opening/<id> as a student renders the opening study viewer with a chess board and no uncaught errors.

features.name: Trainer games Free editor mode
features.description: On /trainer/games the Free editor tab opens a position editor with piece picker (king/queen/rook/bishop/knight/pawn for both sides), delete-piece control, and Starting position / Empty board reset buttons.
